subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This is a handmaiden who hath turned her face in sincerity toward Thy gracious countenance, and hath voiced Thy praise and remembrance amidst every great multitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذه امة اخلصت وجهها لوجهک الکریم و نطقت بذکرک و ثنائک بین کل جم غفیر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions
